arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey gives honest thoughts on INEOS after working with Man Utd owners
arts.sum: INEOS became involved at Manchester United in February following Sir Jim Ratcliffe's £1.3billion deal to acquire a minority stake in the club, but fans haven't witnessed progress this season

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS will do an 'unbelievable job' at transforming Man United, says Aaron Ramsey as he offers insight having played for sister club Nice
arts.sum: Ramsey, formerly of Nice, part of INEOS' multi-club network, made the prediction after spending time with figures at the top of the company.

arts.ttl: 'No sentiment': Portsmouth boss shrugs off Cardiff reunion with the summer signing who got away
arts.sum: Alex Robertson will be treated as ‘just another opponent’ when Pompey lock horns with their former favourite.

arts.ttl: ‘The new Andy Cole’: Portsmouth set to be united with landmark £1m Arsenal signing which never was at Cardiff City
arts.sum: He was the man set to become Pompey’s first £1m signing, the rising starlet touted as ‘the next Andy Cole’.

arts.ttl: 'Difficult decisions and difficult conversations': Why Portsmouth boss must change a winning team for Cardiff and Sheffield Wednesday
arts.sum: John Mousinho is braced to hold ‘difficult conversations’ as he eyes rotating his squad to cope with Pompey’s hectic playing period.

arts.ttl: Championship Team of the Week - including ex-Portsmouth star, Cardiff City and Bristol City aces
arts.sum: No Portsmouth stars make the starting XI despite recording first win of the 2024/25 campaign

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss reveals return dates for injured players ahead of Cardiff City and Sheffield Wednesday
arts.sum: John Mousinho is expecting a fairly prompt return for the latest players added to Pompey’s injury list.

arts.ttl: What really unfolded in Portsmouth lift drama with players trapped and ‘water rations’ as they grab maiden Championship win at QPR
arts.sum: It’s the Pompey drama that’s gone viral as the players picked up their first Championship win of the season at QPR.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss' admission as temporary switch could become permanent - starting with Cardiff
arts.sum: John Mousinho suggested Pompey’s system switch could become a permanent fixture after driving their first win of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City star in Portsmouth transfer admission and reveals why he's stopped playing for his country
arts.sum: The Bluebirds player has been one of the standouts in a so-far disappointing campaign
